task_snapshots.title: [373a] Metrics & Telemetry Foundation
task_snapshots.description:
Build metric classes, judge verdict structure, and telemetry schema. [subtask of ebb295cedbce]

**Files created:**
- src/bernstein/eval/__init__.py
- src/bernstein/eval/metrics.py — TaskCompletionRate, RetryRate, AgentUtilization, CostEfficiency, TimeEfficiency, ContextWaste (Pydantic BaseModel)
- src/bernstein/eval/telemetry.py — strict schema for agent output metadata with violation detection
- src/bernstein/eval/judge.py — JudgeVerdict dataclass only (correctness, style, test_coverage, safety, verdict, issues)
- tests/unit/test_eval_metrics.py
- tests/unit/test_eval_judge.py (judge verdict serialization only)

**Completion signals:**
- test_passes: uv run pytest tests/unit/test_eval_metrics.py -x -q
- test_passes: uv run pytest tests/unit/test_eval_judge.py -x -q
- file_contains: src/bernstein/eval/metrics.py :: TaskCompletionRate
- file_contains: src/bernstein/eval/telemetry.py :: agent output metadata
- file_contains: src/bernstein/eval/judge.py :: JudgeVerdict
